checks.name: 1. Pi startup returns OK
checks.detail: Pi returned exact OK.

checks.name: 2. Project prompt and skill discovery
checks.detail: Prompt templates and project skills discovered through RPC get_commands.

checks.name: 3. task_update tool available in live Pi session
checks.detail: task_update executed in a live Pi session.

checks.name: 4. TypeScript compile check for runtime extensions
checks.detail: Temporary isolated compile sandbox passed.

checks.name: 5. safe-bash allows safe pwd command
checks.detail: pwd executed successfully through bash tool.

checks.name: 6. safe-bash blocks .env write through write tool
checks.detail: Direct .env write was blocked by safe-bash.

checks.name: 7. safe-bash blocks .env write through bash
checks.detail: Bash redirect into .env was blocked by safe-bash.

checks.name: 8. safe-bash blocks destructive git reset on non-main branch
checks.detail: Destructive git reset was blocked on disposable sandbox branch.

checks.name: 9. till-done blocks direct mutation without task
checks.detail: Direct write without task was blocked.

checks.name: 10. till-done rejects done without evidence
checks.detail: Done without evidence was rejected after review handoff.

checks.name: 11. safe-bash blocks write tool mutation on main
checks.detail: Direct write on main was blocked and audit log recorded the main-branch context.

checks.name: 12. safe-bash blocks mutating bash on main
checks.detail: Mutating bash on main was blocked and audit log recorded the main-branch context.

checks.name: 13. till-done requires review before done
checks.detail: Direct in_progress to done was rejected as expected.

checks.name: 14. till-done requeue and retry audit fields
checks.detail: Retry count and requeue audit fields were recorded as expected.

checks.name: 15. till-done requires validation before done
checks.detail: Done without validation proof was rejected for the default implementation task class.

checks.name: 16. till-done allows lightweight docs validation path
checks.detail: Docs task completed after lightweight review validation with not_applicable tests/diff review.

checks.name: 17. till-done routes validation fail and blocked into visible rejection states
checks.detail: Validation fail/block outcomes produced visible failed/blocked task states.

checks.name: 18. till-done manual override path is explicit and completion-enabling
checks.detail: Manual override recorded approval metadata and enabled bounded completion.

checks.name: 19. Optional full-stack interaction with both runtime controls
checks.detail: Full-stack check skipped by default.

checks.name: 20. Cleanup and runtime state reset
checks.detail: Cleanup removed validation artifacts and reset tasks runtime state.
